R[Response]\n  R -->|remember| M\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Plugin Hooks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne registers the following Hermes hooks:"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Hook | Timing | Action |\n|------|--------|--------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pre_prompt"}]," | Before LLM call | Inject relevant memories |\n| | Agent shutdown | Run sleep consolidation
